testcase.name: test_03_war_room_without_product_or_service

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 400 assert 400 in [200, 422, 500] + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_130_production.py:109: in test_03_war_room_without_product_or_service assert response.status_code in [200, 422, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 400 E assert 400 in [200, 422, 500] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_war_room_with_product_or_service
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_130_production.py:136: in test_04_war_room_with_product_or_service assert response.status_code in [200, 500] E assert 400 in [200, 500] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
